summary: Iteration 27: Tested Crew Member Role feature - registration, dashboard, and all 4 tabs (Capture, Standards, Training, History). Backend: 14/14 tests passed. All crew member endpoints working correctly. Frontend: All pages render correctly on mobile viewport with proper data-testid attributes. Registration flow generates QR code. Dashboard shows member info with 4 functional tabs. Crew leader invite card with copy link button works.

issues: GPS permission toast appears on page load (expected - Playwright has no GPS)

test_credentials: No auth needed - all crew member endpoints are public. Parent access code: 000a07ca (North Crew, Install). Test member codes: ef04449f (John Smith), c694a71f (Mike Rivera)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Playwright_* members during testing (auto-cleanup not needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified Crew Member Role feature: (1) POST /api/public/crew-members/register - creates member with 8-char code, validates name required, validates parent_access_code exists. (2) GET /api/public/crew-member/{code} - returns member profile with parent crew info. (3) GET /api/public/crew-member/{code}/standards - returns division-filtered standards. (4) GET /api/public/crew-member/{code}/training - returns parent crew's training sessions. (5) GET /api/public/crew-member/{code}/submissions - returns member-tagged submissions with pagination. Frontend routes: /member/join/:parentCode (registration with QR code generation), /member/:code (4-tab dashboard: Capture, Standards, Training, History). Crew leader page /crew/:code has 'Invite crew members' card with copy link button (data-testid='crew-copy-member-link-button'). Invalid codes return 404 with proper error UI.

POST /api/public/crew-members/register.success: PASS - Returns code, name, division, parent_crew_label

GET /api/public/crew-member/{code}/train.success: PASS - Returns parent crew training sessions

GET /api/public/crew-member/{code}/submi.pagination: PASS - page and limit params work

GET /api/public/crew-access/{code}.success: PASS - Returns crew link for member invite flow
